findings.location: s7 — 認可判定と開閉局判定の結果に応じた表示切り替え
findings.description: The `submitLinkDisabledJsp` configuration property name is not mentioned anywhere in the knowledge file. The source footnote [#] explicitly names this property in `CustomTagConfig` as the setting for specifying a custom JSP for inactive link rendering, enabling per-project customization of inactive link appearance. An AI asked how to customize inactive link display would need this property name to give a complete answer.
findings.source_evidence: 脚注 [#]: 「非活性リンクの描画に任意のJSPを使用することができる。これによりプロジェクト毎に表示方法を容易にカスタマイズできる。:ref:`WebView_CustomTagConfig` の `submitLinkDisabledJsp` の項を参照。」

findings.location: s6 hints — ボタン又はリンク毎にパラメータを変更する方法
findings.description: The RST anchor `WebView_ChangeableParams` (defined as `.. _WebView_ChangeableParams:` immediately before this section heading) is missing from s6 hints. This reference label would be used to search for this section and is the standard cross-reference name for this feature.
findings.source_evidence: .. _WebView_ChangeableParams: (anchor defined directly before the section heading in the source)

findings.location: s1 hints — ボタン又はリンクによるフォームのサブミット
findings.description: Six of the nine `:ref:` labels from the custom tag table's first column are missing from s1 hints: `WebView_PopupSubmitTag`, `WebView_PopupButtonTag`, `WebView_PopupLinkTag`, `WebView_DownloadSubmitTag`, `WebView_DownloadButtonTag`, `WebView_DownloadLinkTag`. Only three (`WebView_SubmitTag`, `WebView_ButtonTag`, `WebView_SubmitLinkTag`) are present. These reference names are the natural search terms for users looking up specific popup/download tag behaviors.
